Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mirror of Silence]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The Mirror of Silence is a complex spell that the protagonist can seal into an object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The Mirror of Silence is a proprietary spell of the Vallenar Corporation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The Mirror of Silence causes missiles to sprout black-and-white clones of themselves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 20''' — Benri Vallenar uses the Mirror of Silence to create indistinguishable copies of himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — The Mirror of Silence can create copies of people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — The Mirror of Silence is a spell used to make copies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Mirror of Silence is an Archmage spell considered a masterpiece.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Mirror of Silence brings shadows of potential to life to multiply resources.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — The Mirror of Silence copies have faded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — The Mirror of Silence can be used to watch memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Mirror of Silence is used to clone Legionnaires.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Benri Vallenar uses the Mirror of Silence technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — The Mirror of Silence is an entity or object that was not seen during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 46''' — The Mirror of Silence creates a black-and-white copy of the caster to send out sealing spells.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — The Mirror of Silence is a spell that can be used to identify flaws in construction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Mirror of Silence is a spell that can be chanted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Mirror of Silence is a spell used by the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — The Mirror of Silence is a spell that can create a single clone.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Mirror of Silence can be used to create clones of a fabricator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — The Mirror of Silence is used to create long-term duplicates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — The Mirror of Silence creates copies constructed from the Aether based on possibilities.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — The Mirror of Silence is an information security spell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — Proving the Mirror of Silence would work was part of Benri's initiation into Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Mirror of Silence is a spell that causes Sola to split into six.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The Mirror of Silence causes clones to vanish.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — The Mirror of Silence is an enchantment that allows a Lightcaster to copy shots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The Mirror of Silence copy can be dissolved to nothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — The Mirror of Silence is an artifact owned by Benri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Mirror of Silence clone is a component of the new Iron King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri's enhanced spell combines Teranon's analytical spells with his own Mirror of Silence to trace possibilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Mirror of Silence clones shots as they are fired.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — The Mirror of Silence spell used by the narrator creates short-lived copies that last about five seconds.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
